mapper.select: SELECT p.no, p.writer_id, m.nickname AS writer_nickname, p.title, p.content, p.role_type, p.tier, p.mic_yn, p.main_hero, p.status, TO_CHAR(p.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_party p JOIN ow_member m ON p.writer_id = m.id WHERE p.no = #{no}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_ow_party_no.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ow_party(no, writer_id, title, content, role_type, tier, mic_yn, main_hero) VALUES(#{no}, #{writerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{roleType}, #{tier}, #{micYn}, #{mainHero})
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_party SET status = #{status} WHERE no = #{no}
